description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AWS CodeBuild CI that runs on pull requests, pushes, and once a day. The workflow should also be callable from another workflow, passing the required CI_AWS_ROLE_ARN secret. Use a ubuntu-latest job with read permission to repository contents and write permission to ID tokens. In the job, use a matrix strategy to run AWS CodeBuild tests with different Python versions and CodeBuild file names. Configure AWS credentials using the provided role ARN and run the CodeBuild tests with a 120-minute timeout.
